titleStmt.title: SII 18.69: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 69. (B.K. No. 32 of 1932-33.) DĒVĪHOSŪR, HAVERI TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Stone pillars of a tōraṇa in the temple of Banaśaṅkari.

summary.p: This inscription, referring itself to the reign of Trailōkymalladēva, is dated in Śaka 984, Śubhakṛit, Phālguṇa s11u. 13, Thursday, corresponding to A.D. 1063, February 13, Thursday, f.d.t. ·02.

It states that when Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Chāvuṇḍarāyarasa was governing Banavāsi Twelve-thousand, and his son Mahāsāmanta Kumāra Jōmadēvarasa was administering Bāsavura Hundred-and-forty, Beḷguhe Seventy and Sattaḷige Seventy, Indapayya, the royal body-guard got a makaratōraṇa erected in the temple of Māḷajadēvi at Deyvada-posāvur (modern Dēvihosūr). It may be noted here that this Jōmadēvarasa is stated in No. 60 above, to be the son of Barma who was the son of Chāvuṇḍarāya. In No. 73, below, Barma is called the brother of the latter. It is likely that in No. 60 he is mistakenly called the son.
Lōkanāthayya was the pergaḍe of Three Seventies, and Rājādityarasa of the Jimūtavāhana family was the nāḷgāvuṇḍa of Bāsavūr Hundred-and-forty. The writer of the record is stated to be Dēvanāgayya.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svastisamastabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrīpṛthvīvallabha mahārājā
dhirāja paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ
cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmattraiḷōkyamalladēvara vijayarājya
muttarōttarābhivṛddhipravarddhamānamācandrārkkatāraṁ salutta
mire tatpādapadmārādhaka svasti samadhigatapaṁcamahāśa
bda mahāmaṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ banavāsipuravarēśvaraṁ gaṇḍara
gaṇḍaṁ gaṇḍabhēruṇḍa mūṟurāyarāsthānakalibiru
damaṇḍaḷika vṛṣabhasaṁkara ripuvṛṣabhasaṁkaraṁ pratyakṣa
vikramādityaṁ jagadēkadāni nāmādisamastaprasastisa
hitaṁ śrīmanmahāmaṇḍaḷēśvara cāvuṇḍarāyarasarbbanavāse
pannircchāsiramumaṁ duṣṭanigrahaviśiṣṭapratipāḷaneyiṁ su
khasaṁkathāvinōdadināḷuttamire tattaneyaṁ samadhigatapaṁcama
hāśabda mahāsāmantādhipati vijayalakṣmīkāṁtaṁ vidagdhavidyādha
ra samaradhurandharanu bhayacuriya bhṛgumatā
ryyaṁ mandaradhairyyaṁ kṣatriyapavitraṁ kumaratriṇētra
nammana gaṁdhavāraṇaṁ nāmūdisamastapraśastisahitaṁ śrīmanma
hāsāmaṁta kumāraṁ jōmadēvarasarbāsavura 140 ma beḷguhe
yeppattumaṁ sattaḷigeyeḷpattumanāḷuttamire tatpāda
padmōpajīvi samastarājyabharanirūpita mahāmātya
padavīvirājamānarappa śrīmatperggaḍe lōkanātha
yyaṁgaḷ mūḻarppattarkkaṁ perggaḍetanaṁ geyye samastavasu
matītaḷakhyātaṁ jīmūtavāhanānvayaprasū
ta bandhujanakamaḷinīrājahaṁsa padmāvatīlabdhavara
prasādaṁ śrīmanmanneyaṁ rājādityaresar bāsavura
140 ttarkaṁ nāḻgāvuṇḍugeyye

svasti yamanimamasvādhyāyadhyānadhāraṇamōnānuṣṭhāṇaja
pasamādhisaṁpannarappa srīmadagrahāra deyvada posavūra
sāsirvvaru vūraṁ pratipāḷisuttamire svasti sakanṛpakā
ḷātītasaṁvatsara sataṁgaḷ 984 neya subhakṛtsaṁvatsarada pā
lguṇa suddha 13 bṛhaspativāradaṁdu . svasti yarinṛpama
dēbhakuṁbhikuṁbhasthaḷavidāraṇakiśōrakēsari toḍare murāri ka
ḍitalepaṁcānanaṁ vandijanakānīnaṁ sōmēśvaradāsi kadana
pracaṇḍaṁ śrīmanmahālakṣmīdēvipādapaṁkajabhramaranappa
śrīmadhaṁgharakkaṁ Asagaṁ Indapayyanāyaka . vṛtta . kāḷige kāḷarākṣasige raudrege bhairavigugregā mahā
kāḷige kāḷayōginige māḻajadēvategindaraṁ suratnā
ḷi virājisalneṟeye māḍisidaṁ dhare baṇnisalke sallīḷeya
nāṁtiralmakaratōraṇamaṁ posavūroḷarkkaṟiṁ .
vasudhegesediḻda deyvada posavūroḷmakaratōraṇama
narttiyiṁ māḍisidaṁ māḻajadēvige jasamese
diralindapāryyanacaḷitadhairyyaṁ . © dēvanāgayya
likhita vidyādharaṁ bareda . kalkuṭigaṁ bammōja besa
gayda maṁgaḷa mahāśrī ©
Digital edition of SII 18.69 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
